tasks.title: Fix OpenAPI spec default timeout mismatch with implementation
evidence: openapi.yaml:1014-1042 - ScrapeRequest schema allows timeoutSeconds 5-300 with default 30
API handler uses manager.DefaultTimeoutSeconds() when 0, which may differ from schema default
plan: Ensure OpenAPI default matches implementation default
Add test to verify defaults are consistent
tasks.request: scan finding: OpenAPI spec default timeout may not match implementation

tasks.title: Fix ResearchRequest incremental field not implemented
evidence: research.go - Research implementation doesn't use incremental crawling
plan: Or remove incremental field from ResearchRequest schema if not supported
tasks.request: scan finding: ResearchRequest incremental field not implemented

tasks.title: Add Playwright installation guidance to error messages
evidence: playwright_fetcher.go:129-133,142-148 - Playwright initialization errors don't provide actionable guidance
Users get generic 'failed to run Playwright' without instructions on how to install drivers
plan: Add specific error messages for missing Playwright installation
Include installation command in error: 'go run github.com/playwright-community/playwright-go/cmd/playwright@v0.5200.1 install --with-deps'
tasks.request: scan finding: Playwright errors lack installation guidance

tasks.title: Fix path redaction regex being overly aggressive
evidence: sanitize.go:22-33 - Path redaction regex is overly aggressive
Legitimate URL paths like /api/v1/users get redacted, making debugging harder
plan: Refine regex to only redact sensitive paths (auth, tokens, keys, secrets)
Add tests for common legitimate paths that should NOT be redacted
tasks.request: scan finding: path redaction too aggressive hurts debugging

tasks.title: Add config validation warnings for invalid env vars
evidence: config.go:78-103 - No validation warnings for invalid env vars
Invalid values silently fall back to defaults without warning the user
plan: Add warning logs for invalid environment variable values
Include the invalid value and what default is being used
tasks.request: scan finding: invalid env vars silently use defaults
